message:
Upgrade 17 dependencies and switch toolchain to nightly

Dependency updates (all passing tests):
- clap 4.5.54 -> 4.5.60, clap_complete 4.5.44 -> 4.5.66
- serde_json 1.0.140 -> 1.0.149, toml 0.9 -> 1.0.3
- anyhow 1.0.100 -> 1.0.102, thiserror 2.0.17 -> 2.0.18
- tokio 1.44 -> 1.49, reqwest 0.13.1 -> 0.13.2
  (removed webpki-roots feature, now bundled by default)
- chrono 0.4.42 -> 0.4.43, rich_rust =0.1.0 -> 0.2.0
  (removed exact version pin)
- colored 3.1.0 -> 3.1.1, tracing 0.1.41 -> 0.1.44
- tracing-subscriber 0.3.19 -> 0.3.22, regex 1.11 -> 1.12.3
- futures 0.3.31 -> 0.3.32, tempfile 3.15 -> 3.25
- jsonschema 0.28 -> 0.42, assert_cmd 2.0 -> 2.1 (dev-deps)

Toolchain: stable -> nightly (1.95.0-nightly 2026-02-19) to enable
let-chains and other nightly features used in the source code changes.

Skipped: keyring 4.0.0-rc.3, notify 9.0.0-rc.2, sha2 0.11.0-rc.5
(all RC-only, staying on latest stable releases).

UPGRADE_LOG.md rewritten with full details of each update, migration
notes, and documentation of ~825 new nightly clippy warnings to
address separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
